input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A static logo displays "Hot Thai Kitchen" in bold, black, hand-drawn font inside a rough rectangular border. To the right, a stylized woman with red hair wears a grey top and red skirt, posing with a hand on her hip against a white background. No visual changes occur during this segment.</think><answer></answer>

A hand adds chopped orange squash with green skin to the pan and stirs the mixture with a metal spatula. Finally, a clear liquid is poured over the sautéing vegetables and garlic, continuing the cooking process.

samples.output: <think>The static white end screen continues, featuring black text "Related Videos" and "CLICK HERE for the Full Version Kabocha Squash Dessert Recipe". A red URL "www.HotThaiKitchen.com" appears above a "Hot Thai Kitchen" logo box containing a stylized figure, with "Click to Subscribe!" written below.</think><answer></answer>

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] A static logo displays "Hot Thai Kitchen" in bold black hand-drawn font inside a rough rectangular border, featuring a stylized woman with red hair in a grey top and red skirt posing with a hand on her hip. [2-8] The scene shifts to a white bowl of stir-fried orange pumpkin chunks with green skin and basil on a dark surface. A semi-transparent logo overlays the dish while white text "Pad Faktong" appears, later changing to "Kabocha Squash Stir-Fry". [8-12] A hand uses a metal spatula to transfer the squash mixture into the bowl on a light wooden cutting board, followed by hands placing a fresh green basil leaf on top. [12-14] A woman with dark hair in a green sleeveless top and long necklace stands in a kitchen holding the bowl. She eats a bite with a fork near a black refrigerator featuring a white board and colorful elephant magnets.

[14-16] A woman with dark hair in a green sleeveless top and necklace holds a fork near her mouth, looking at the camera before the scene cuts to white.
[16-20] Clear oil is poured from a metal spoon into a silver wok with reddish-brown residue on a black stovetop. A hand wearing a silver watch drops minced garlic into the hot oil.
[20-24] A metal spatula stirs the pale yellow garlic chunks in the oil, moving them around the bottom of the pan near the dark residue ring.
[24-26] The hand holding a small pink bowl pours chopped orange squash chunks with green skin into the wok, landing on top of the sautéing garlic.

[28-32] A hand pours clear liquid from a glass measuring cup into a silver wok containing chopped orange squash with green skin and minced garlic, followed by a dark brown liquid from a small pink bowl. [32-36] A white granular substance is added from a small white bowl onto the simmering mixture as a metal spatula rests in the pan. [36-40] The squash chunks bubble in the dark sauce before a metal spatula stirs and tosses the coated vegetables, mixing them with the liquid and garlic.

[42-54] A metal spatula stirs and lifts orange squash chunks with green skin inside a silver wok. The vegetables are coated in a bubbling brown sauce containing minced garlic. The spatula moves through the mixture, tossing and turning the pile to ensure the squash is evenly covered in the simmering liquid. As the sauce bubbles, the spatula agitates the ingredients, mixing them thoroughly. The vegetables glisten as they are tossed around the pan, ensuring even coating in the dark, simmering sauce. The continuous motion keeps the squash moving within the hot wok.

Fresh green basil leaves are dropped into a silver wok on top of a cooking orange squash mixture. A metal spatula stirs the leaves into the hot pan, mixing them with the vegetables and sauce as steam rises. The leaves are folded under, wilting slightly from the heat. After a brief white screen, a white square bowl appears on a light wooden cutting board. A metal spatula transfers the cooked squash and basil mixture from the wok into the bowl. A person wearing a green sleeveless top and silver watch uses a silver fork to arrange the food. Finally, they use both hands to place fresh green basil leaves on top of the dish as a garnish, adjusting them before moving their hands away.

A semi-transparent logo overlays the dish while white text "Pad Faktong" appears, later changing to "Kabocha Squash Stir-Fry". [8-12] A hand uses a metal spatula to transfer the squash mixture into the bowl on a light wooden cutting board, followed by hands placing a fresh green basil leaf on top. [12-14] A woman with dark hair in a green sleeveless top and long necklace stands in a kitchen holding the bowl. She eats a bite with a fork near a black refrigerator featuring a white board and colorful elephant magnets.

[14-16] A woman with dark hair in a green sleeveless top and necklace holds a fork near her mouth, looking at the camera before the scene cuts to white.
[16-20] Clear oil is poured from a metal spoon into a silver wok with reddish-brown residue on a black stovetop. A hand wearing a silver watch drops minced garlic into the hot oil.
[20-24] A metal spatula stirs the pale yellow garlic chunks in the oil, moving them around the bottom of the pan near the dark residue ring.
[24-26] The hand holding a small pink bowl pours chopped orange squash chunks with green skin into the wok, landing on top of the sautéing garlic.

[28-32] A hand pours clear liquid from a glass measuring cup into a silver wok containing chopped orange squash with green skin and minced garlic, followed by a dark brown liquid from a small pink bowl. The continuous motion keeps the squash moving within the hot wok.

Fresh green basil leaves are dropped into a silver wok on top of a cooking orange squash mixture. A metal spatula stirs the leaves into the hot pan, mixing them with the vegetables and sauce as steam rises. The leaves are folded under, wilting slightly from the heat. After a brief white screen, a white square bowl appears on a light wooden cutting board. A metal spatula transfers the cooked squash and basil mixture from the wok into the bowl. A person wearing a green sleeveless top and silver watch uses a silver fork to arrange the food. Finally, they use both hands to place fresh green basil leaves on top of the dish as a garnish, adjusting them before moving their hands away.

A semi-transparent logo overlays the dish while white text "Pad Faktong" appears, later changing to "Kabocha Squash Stir-Fry". [8-12] A hand uses a metal spatula to transfer the squash mixture into the bowl on a light wooden cutting board, followed by hands placing a fresh green basil leaf on top. [12-14] A woman with dark hair in a green sleeveless top and long necklace stands in a kitchen holding the bowl. She eats a bite with a fork near a black refrigerator featuring a white board and colorful elephant magnets.

[14-16] A woman with dark hair in a green sleeveless top and necklace holds a fork near her mouth, looking at the camera before the scene cuts to white.
[16-20] Clear oil is poured from a metal spoon into a silver wok with reddish-brown residue on a black stovetop. A hand wearing a silver watch drops minced garlic into the hot oil.
[20-24] A metal spatula stirs the pale yellow garlic chunks in the oil, moving them around the bottom of the pan near the dark residue ring.
[24-26] The hand holding a small pink bowl pours chopped orange squash chunks with green skin into the wok, landing on top of the sautéing garlic.

[28-32] A hand pours clear liquid from a glass measuring cup into a silver wok containing chopped orange squash with green skin and minced garlic, followed by a dark brown liquid from a small pink bowl. [32-36] A white granular substance is added from a small white bowl onto the simmering mixture as a metal spatula rests in the pan. [36-40] The squash chunks bubble in the dark sauce before a metal spatula stirs and tosses the coated vegetables, mixing them with the liquid and garlic.

[42-54] A metal spatula stirs and lifts orange squash chunks with green skin inside a silver wok. The vegetables are coated in a bubbling brown sauce containing minced garlic. The spatula moves through the mixture, tossing and turning the pile to ensure the squash is evenly covered in the simmering liquid. As the sauce bubbles, the spatula agitates the ingredients, mixing them thoroughly. The vegetables glisten as they are tossed around the pan, ensuring even coating in the dark, simmering sauce. The continuous motion keeps the squash moving within the hot wok.

recent_thinks: [26-28] A woman in a green sleeveless top stands at a stove, using a metal spatula to stir ingredients in a silver wok. The view shifts to a close-up of the pan, showing the spatula tossing chopped orange squash chunks with green skin and minced garlic in the hot oil.

[40-42] The metal spatula continues to toss the orange squash chunks, ensuring they are evenly coated in the simmering dark sauce. The liquid bubbles gently around the vegetables as they are moved across the bottom of the silver wok, mixing with the garlic.

[54-56] Fresh green basil leaves are dropped into the silver wok on top of the cooking squash mixture. A metal spatula stirs the leaves into the hot pan, mixing them with the vegetables and sauce as steam rises from the dish.

[56-58] A metal spatula mixes fresh green basil leaves into the simmering orange squash and sauce within the silver wok. The leaves are folded under the vegetables, wilting slightly from the heat as steam rises from the pan during the stirring process.

[58-60] A white screen flashes briefly before showing a white square bowl on a light wooden cutting board. A metal spatula transfers the cooked squash and basil mixture from the silver wok into the bowl, followed by a hand arranging the food with a fork.

[60-62] A person wearing a green sleeveless top uses a silver fork to arrange the cooked orange squash and green basil mixture inside a white square bowl placed on a light wooden cutting board. The metal spatula transfers the remaining food from the silver wok visible in the background before the hand adjusts the plated dish.

[62-64] A person wearing a green top and silver watch uses both hands to sprinkle fresh green basil leaves over the cooked orange squash mixture in a white square bowl. The bowl rests on a light wooden cutting board while the silver wok sits in the background.

queries.question: What color is the sleeveless top worn by the woman tasting the dish?

samples.output: <think>A person wearing a green top and silver watch uses both hands to place fresh green basil leaves on top of the cooked orange squash mixture in a white square bowl. The bowl sits on a wooden board, and the silver wok is visible in the background. The hands adjust the garnish and then move away.</think><answer></answer>
